evidence.text: Percentage of Participants With Vaccine Seroresponse for Meningococcal Serogroups A, C, Y, and W Following Vaccination With Either MenACYW Conjugate Vaccine or Menomune® Vaccine

evidence.label: Primary outcome (AACT)
evidence.text: Geometric Mean of Antibody Titers (GMTs) as Measured by Serum Bactericidal Assay (SBA) at Baseline (Day 0) and Day 28 Post-vaccination.

evidence.label: Primary outcome (AACT)
evidence.text: Meningococcal Polysaccharide A Serum Bactericidal Antibodies/Assay, Using Baby Rabbit Complement for Assay (rSBA-MenA), rSBA-MenC, rSBA-MenW-135 and rSBA-MenY Titers
